articles.title: AI Regulatory Sandboxes
articles.summary: Member States shall establish at least one sandbox at national level for development, testing, and validation of innovative AI under regulatory oversight.

articles.title: Detailed Arrangements for Sandboxes
articles.summary: Rules for sandbox operation: entry/exit criteria, terms, conditions, and information requirements.

articles.title: Personal Data Processing in Sandboxes
articles.summary: Lawful processing of personal data in sandboxes for AI development in the public interest, with safeguards and DPIA.

articles.title: Testing in Real-World Conditions
articles.summary: Conditions for real-world testing outside sandboxes: informed consent, safeguards, registration.

articles.title: Informed Consent for Testing
articles.summary: Test subjects must give freely given informed consent with information about nature, purpose, and right to withdraw.

articles.title: Measures for SMEs and Start-ups
articles.summary: Priority sandbox access, dedicated awareness channels, reduced fees for SMEs and start-ups.

articles.title: Derogations for Specific Operators
articles.summary: Simplified conformity procedures for micro-enterprises meeting specified criteria.
